title: Movie
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: Kamli Ishq Di
desc: Mahi playfully demands an apology from Veer, then spots white powder packets and grows suspicious. Meanwhile, Lalli pushes Preeto to reconsider Sundi. Soon after, Hukum confronts Mahi at gunpoint.

title: Geet Dholi
desc: A young woman, who loves to play the dhol, tries to live in a society dominated by men with her husband's undying support.

title: Dheeyan Meriyan
desc: Gagan picks up Menka's breakfast from Asha's dhaba. Menka objects and pressures Joginder to confront Asha. Meanwhile, Yuvraj prepares to publicly support Roop on her birthday.

title: Chhoti Jathani
desc: Ajooni, a young woman, falls in love with and marries Zorawar. However, their marital bliss is interrupted when Zorawar's sister-in-law, Savreen, creates impediments for the couple.

title: Dildariyan
desc: From their first encounter, two individuals with opposing personalities, Ambar and Avni, clash with one another. However, their relationship changes over time.

title: Nayan... Jo Vekhe Unvekha
desc: When Rajbeer interrogates Neelam about Nayan, she drives him away from her house. However, he crosses paths with Nayan, thanks to her vision.

title: Shareek
desc: A feudal war is caused between Jassa and his cousins over the ownership of a piece of land. This leads to their families becoming sworn enemies for generations thereafter.
